feature.name: ARIA Notify API
feature.creator: sartang@microsoft.com
feature.summary:
ariaNotify provides a JavaScript API that enables content authors to directly tell a screen reader what to read. 

ariaNotify improves reliability and developer control compared to ARIA live regions, allowing for announcing changes not tied to DOM updates. This enables more consistent and ergonomic accessibility experiences across dynamic web applications. Iframe usage of this feature can be controlled via a permission policy "aria-notify".

Category: DOM. Blink component: Blink>Accessibility. Stars: 72.

adoption.finding: The legacy HTML/JS counter 'AriaNotify' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 5383) measured 0.1651% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2025-04-09 with 473 data points. Mapping confidence: name-matched-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the AriaNotify family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 141 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
